T0150.title: Risk Control Bypass
T0150.definition: The act of using various technical methods to bypass or crack a system's risk-control mechanisms. This allows fraudsters to conduct illegal activities without restrictions, such as increasing payment limits or bypassing identity verification.
T0150.description: The act of using various technical methods to bypass or crack a system's risk-control mechanisms. This allows fraudsters to conduct illegal activities without restrictions, such as increasing payment limits or bypassing identity verification.
T0150.usageExample: 这套新系统风控太严，之前的脚本不行了，技术组正在研究新的破空方案。
